---
pagetitle: "Teaching"
listing: 
  - id: preparatory
    template: ../../system/templates/listings/badges-buttons-link-accordion.ejs.html
    contents: ../../data/teaching/preparatory.yml
    template-params:
      type: course
      lang: en
  - id: undergraduate
    template: ../../system/templates/listings/badges-buttons-link-accordion.ejs.html
    contents: ../../data/teaching/undergraduate.yml
    template-params:
      type: course
      lang: en
  - id: graduate
    template: ../../system/templates/listings/badges-buttons-link-accordion.ejs.html
    contents: ../../data/teaching/graduate.yml
    template-params:
      type: course
      lang: en
---


# Undergraduate courses

The following are undergraduate-level courses that I currently teach or have taught to first- and second-year students.

::: {#preparatory}
:::


The following are undergraduate-level courses that I currently teach or have taught to third-year students.

::: {#undergraduate}
:::

# Graduate courses
The following are graduate-level courses that I currently teach or have taught.

::: {#graduate}
:::
